title: Missed May's shipment for no reason caused a lot of medical problems
body: Missed May's shipment for no reason caused a lot of medical problems. I think the Doctors here don't understand basic medical concepts. They should go back to medical school. I will cancel the membership

title: Charged $299 After Being Told I Wasn't Eligible
body: I attempted to sign up for Tesamorelin through Maximus and had a very disappointing experience. The process required me to provide extensive personal information upfront, including a selfie and my driver's license, and I was charged $299 before any determination of eligibility was made. After completing the entire intake process, I reached the final page only to be told that, based on my responses, I was 'not the right fit' for the product. At that point, I had already been charged and had to contact customer service just to request a refund. In my opinion, if someone is ultimately deemed inelig

title: Overcharged!!
body: They charged me for three months of a prescription and only sent me one month of the prescription. I have trued to work through their customer service and they are being extremely difficult. I would stay away from this company, their business practices are terrible!!

title: Another shady online TRT company
body: This company looks great on the outside. They are super happy to take your money as quickly as possible. Customer service is absolutely abysmal. I had an issue with a TRT bottle and it took them 3+ weeks to get the issue fixed. I asked many times to have someone call me through email, chat and text and never got anyone to call me. They have now billed me for bloodwork 3 times in just over 60 days, which is insane. They don't tell you they are shipping the $100 kit, they just send it. They also don't mention that your first bottle is $100 and then it goes up to $200 unless you pay in full by th

title: Poor customer service, would not recommend
body: After paying, I was given a single appointment time with the prescribing physician: 10:20 PM Eastern Time on a Friday night. For obvious reasons, this was not an appointment time that I wanted to keep, but there was no other availability on the physician's calendar. I reached out to customer support multiple times, and five days later they have not offered any resolution or even acknowledged the issue at hand. I regret signing up with Maximus.

title: I am writing this to warn any new or existing TRT customers about the 'Maximus Labs' rollout and their absolute lack of accountability
body: As a new TRT patient, I was required to do follow-up labs. Before spending $200 on their internal Maximus Lab panel, I explicitly asked support—and verified via screenshots—if this panel included all necessary markers for a TRT follow-up. They confirmed it did. It did not. The results came back missing Free Testosterone, making the entire panel useless for a TRT follow-up. Without that marker, I have no idea how my body is responding to treatment or if my levels

title: Telehealth should not be this difficult, but here it is
body: After an extended period as a paying customer, I cannot recommend this company. This was not a one-off issue. It was a consistent, ongoing pattern of problems across doctors, customer service, and fulfillment that never meaningfully improved, even after repeated escalation through multiple channels. This is a telehealth service involving prescribed medication. That carries a higher expectation of accuracy, consistency, and reliability. Delays, errors, and lack of coordination are not minor inconveniences in this context. They directly impact continuity of care.

title: Horrible experience
body: I cancelled the service prior to the annual renewal. They still charged me for the annual fee ($1.2K) and didn't respond for a week of reaching out (said customer support was being overwhelmed with volume). Their customer service is horrendous and they've yet to refund me after 7 weeks... Stay clear of these guys!

title: horrible support
body: horrible support. took them over a month to get my testing done and get my prescription due to their lack of coordination. going to look at other companies for my prescription.

title: Billed me for several months and never shipped products
body: Billed me for several months and never shipped products once....had to cancel credit card to resolve billing....customer service is pathetic. Avoid.

title: Abysmal Communication
body: Really bad communication. Care Team, Support Team, Elation Passport, etc. The communication is extremely disjointed and confusing with this company. This led me to miss a message through one of their channels that they need updated lab results. 30 days later, I get a message that 'Your subscription has been cancelled'. I replied asking for more information. Complete crickets. Nothing. So, I messaged customer service. 48 hours later, they asked me for my name, dob and address. I provided it. 48 hours after that, they said I didn't give them lab results so I'm out of the program.

title: Find another Company
body: Every time I deal with them it's a problem. They don't respond, the prescriptions are late and incorrect. My entire experience with them is horrible. It's almost like if there is a way to do it poorly they have figured it out. I understand they don't think this is how they operate but every prescription or refill I have gotten from them has had problems. They don't respond in a timely manner. Just recently I had to call the 3 time, send 4 chat messages and at least 3 emails and they still sent the wrong prescription. As I mentioned about its a problem every time.

title: Cant get a hold of anyone at customer service
body: Cant get a hold of anyone at customer service, ive tried calling mulitple times, tried the live chat and text and no one has responded. My credit card was charged an insane amount for a subscription I had paused and says doesnt renew until June. I should have read the reviews on here first as there is a bunch of people with the same issue. I had to call my credit card company to dispute the charge. Steer clear of this company unless you have disposable income to pay for bogus charges with nothing to show for it!!

title: Spend your money elsewhere
body: Been receiving oral T and Enclomiphene for about a year now. Went through several doctors during that time and every time I start getting low I need to reach out to them and remind them that I'm low. Currently sitting at 1 week without my prescription and expect atleast another week, maybe two, who knows, without my prescription. Bots are no help and I can't talk to a real person. Doctor won't respond to my messages. I highly recommend spending your money elsewhere.

title: Company has gone down hill. Garbage customer service now.
body: Been a patient with Maximus for over 4 years. At first, they provided excellent customer service. That's all changed. I've paid for annual subscription each year, but in the middle of this last year, the company stopped providing the medication to my state. They downgraded my prescription to lower alternative and then gave me a credit on my account for the difference. I requested for all subscriptions to be cancelled a month ago. Extremely slow responses. Days between emails and chats. Phone calls not answered. Then I received an email telling me my annual subscription would be renewing in a

title: RUN AWAY
body: I Subscribed for the starter set weight lost that's locks you in to a subscription I'm almost 3 months in and had ZERO weight loss. Customer service is terrible and when I asked for assistance all they would say is toSubscribe for another 3Months with. Higher dosage …. Why would I continue when the starter itself DID NOTHING…I should have seen the red flag when you're paying to do a televisit with the provider and he literally NO SHOWS

title: Maximus will keep your subscription if you ask them to stop shipping product
body: I asked Maximus to stop shipping testosterone replacement at the request of my urologist (I was later diagnosed with prostate cancer). After noticing that I kept being charged a monthly subscription, despite having had my product suspended (which added up to over $1400), I wrote back and requested a refund. At first, they (Angel the customer service person) offered a credit to apply to future purchases, to which I replied I am sitting on ample stock and wanted a refund. They then offered a two month refund but said I am not entitled to a full refund because I did not use the Cancel Subscrip

title: Bait and switch
body: Tough to know where to start… it's all gone wrong. 1. Bait and switch - advertised a three month supply of meds which is what I went for. Only supplied one month then when I complained they tried to gaslight me and tell me that's what I signed up for when everything said I didn't. Also, why is it 3x the price from your one month supply. 2. Shipping was supposed to be overnight. Took six days. 3. No acknowledgment of my order for a full 10 days. 4. Only when I threatened a chargeback on my card and a complaint with the state attorney general was a refund and cancellation offered.

title: Terrible customer service
body: Terrible customer service. I am being charged every month for a service I do not use. I have to keep going to my credit card company to block monthly charges. They do nothing except give me the run around. This company is a total scam. Stay away.

title: Charge for Nothing and Abysmal Customer Service
body: Things were great until they weren't! Maximus stopped sending me my medication (though they warn about quitting cold turkey when you try to cancel) and kept charging me for nothing. Their customer service is the worst I have ever experienced. The online chat is generative AI, and when I called their phone number it was clearly a call center where I could not hear or understand the 'agent' due to the loud background noise and his muffled voice. When I called back a recording said an agent is not available.
